words.def: any of various predatory carnivorous canine mammals of North America and Eurasia that usually hunt in packs
words.zh: n. 狼, 殘忍貪婪之人, 極度窮困

words.def: the motion characteristic of fluids (liquids or gases)
words.zh: n. 流程, 流動, 流量, 洋溢, 氾濫, 漲潮

words.def: an air mass of lower pressure; often brings precipitation
words.zh: n. 低點, 低價, 低, 牛叫聲
